title: bihai pendula
intro: Bihai pendula, also known as Buddha's hand, is a unique and fragrant citrus plant species native to China, characterized by its finger-like branches and lack of edible pulp. The medicinal properties of Bihai pendula include its high citron content, which has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate stress. The health benefits of consuming Bihai pendula include its potential to support immune function, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Bihai pendula often involve drying the peel or making it into tea, oil, or powder, which can be used to add flavor and fragrance to food, or as a natural remedy for various health concerns.
